channel.title: How to enable file download ? CORS
channel.description:
Hello !
I'm trying to allow downloads from my Frontity Website, but Wordpress requiers some CORS headers and i have absolutely no idea what needs to be done
Just adding a 'download' attribute on a anchor tag doesnt do the trick 😂
Can someone help me out?
Thank you !

item.title: How to enable file download ? CORS
item.dc:creator: alexis.doroszkiewicz
item.description:
Hello !

I’m trying to allow downloads from my Frontity Website, but Wordpress requiers some CORS headers and i have absolutely no idea what needs to be done

Just adding a ‘download’ attribute on a anchor tag doesnt do the trick

Can someone help me out?

Thank you !

Read full topic
item.source: How to enable file download ? CORS
